About QuickMark

QuickMark

Version 1.0.0

Quick access to your favorite tools from any webpage. Organize bookmarks, discover new tools, and access them instantly with the floating widget.

Features

  • Floating widget on every page
  • Save and organize your favorite tools
  • Discover new tools
  • Customizable appearance
  • Keyboard shortcut (Alt+A)

Tips

  • Drag the widget to reposition it on any edge
  • Right-click any page to add it to Favorites
  • Click × on the widget to temporarily hide it
  • Drag tabs to reorder sections

If you find QuickMark useful, consider supporting its development ☕

Support via paypal
